steps.text: Look at the heights of the columns. The tallest column shows the most votes. Which one reaches highest?

params.description: Monkey Bars column highlights as system demonstrates.

steps.text: Let me show you. I look at each column: Swings has 4 symbols, Slides has 3, Monkey Bars has 5, Sandbox has 2. The tallest column is Monkey Bars with 5 symbols. That's 25 votes. The most popular activity is Monkey Bars because it has the tallest column.

steps.text: Here's a hint: fewest means the smallest number. Look at the column heights. Which one is shortest?

incorrects.description: Student clicked a wrong category three or more times. System models the answer.

params.description: Sandbox column highlights as system demonstrates.

steps.text: Let me walk you through this. I compare the heights: Swings has 4 symbols, Slides has 3, Monkey Bars has 5, Sandbox has 2. The shortest column is Sandbox with only 2 symbols. That's 10 votes. The activity with the fewest votes is Sandbox because it has the shortest column.
